reviews.comment:
Cola cola y poco surtidores disponibles sólo la espera no justifica el descuento

(Translated by Google)
Cola, cola, and few pumps available, just the wait doesn't justify the discount.

reviews.comment:
La atención bien, lastima que en las YPF de la frontera con Uruguay tienen precios diferenciales para los autos con matrícula extranjera. El precio es AR$ 132 y para nosotros nos cobran AR$ 250 el ltr.

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but it's a shame that the YPF gas station on the border with Uruguay has differential prices for cars with foreign license plates. The price is AR$132, while we were charged AR$250 per liter.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPcnFQc19nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Recién cargue combustible más de 40 minutos esperando para cargar solo 2 puesto funcionando. No se porque y tienen como 8 puesto a la verdad que espere que mejoren en eso.

(Translated by Google)
I just filled up and waited over 40 minutes, only two pumps were working. I don't know why, especially since they have about eight pumps. I really hope they improve that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbG95N0x3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
I've always received excellent service at this place!

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio, buena atención, siempre prolijo y limpio, los plateros tienen buena voluntad para ayudar! A veces se junta mucha gente y hay un poco de cola, pero nada grave!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, friendly and attentive, always neat and clean, the silversmiths are very helpful! Sometimes it gets busy and there's a bit of a queue, but nothing serious!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDbnFiZTl3RRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
ACA central es un clasico de la zona de Recoleta, estacion de servicio YPF y centro integral de servicios para el automotor. Calidad y organizacion para la atencion del cliente y muchos beneficios para el socio del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
ACA Central is a classic in the Recoleta area, a YPF service station and comprehensive automotive service center. Quality and organization in customer service and many benefits for ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPek91M3FRRRAB
